arts.ttl: “The man is a genius” – Midfielder praises coach he worked under at Brighton despite players questioning everything
arts.sum: Former Brighton and Hove Albion midfielder Jakub Moder has described Roberto de Zerbi as a genius, despite his methods leaving the Seagulls squad scratching their heads. The midfielder has been speaking about his former manager to Voetbal International, insisting the Italian was undoubtedly the best he’s worked under. De Zerbi was Brighton manager from September The post “The man is a genius” – Midfielder praises coach he worked under at Brighton despite players questioning everything appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Leicester City loanee declares 'season is over' as Kasey McAteer shows potential next step
arts.sum: Cover has been on loan at League Two outfit Fleetwood Town for the second half of the season but posted to social media this week to say he’d played his final game for the club. But with Vale players returning from injury and concerns that Cover would not feature in the second half of the season, City recalled him and sent him on loan to divisional rivals Fleetwood.
